subcodes.first_line: The Prophets of God and the divine Books have all been sent forth for the guidance of humanity, that perchance they might attain unto the station of true liberty and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انبیای الهی و کتب ربانی کل از برای هدایت خلق بوده که شاید بمقام حریت حقیقی و
subcodes.subjects: @rejection of Muhammad, @power of love, @prayer for protection, @purpose of religion in the world (personal and social), @justice and mercy, @suffering and imprisonment
